name: Cool Whip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the Cool Whip and eggs using an electric mixer.
2. Add the lemon cake mix to the mixture. Continue mixing until thick.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into a bowl of powdered sugar.
4. Use a fork to roll each spoonful in the powdered sugar.
5. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 minutes, placing them on the top rack of the oven.
6. This recipe makes about 3 dozen cookies.
